note: both options are close, debuffs are normally weak but gust only does less than 10% so the chip is almost worthless. however multiple sand attacks would be worse, as geodude can switch out to remove all debuffs, so like 3 sand attacks cost 3 turns and geodude switches on turn to remove all debuffs. so sand attack then gust. switching to noctowl is interesting because noctowl can use special attacks to do more damage, but its not worth taking so much damage from geodude. better to sadn attack to weaken geodude then spam gust until you die for safe switch

if quilava is faster then wing attack is better, because otherwise it just goes ember > swords dance > ember and we die

but if scyther is faster, then it goes swords dance > ember > wing attack KOs. 

since wing attack without a boost doesnt Ko quilava, we have to take an ember either way. swords dancing first still kills quilava in 2 turns, taking only one ember, and leaves us with +2

both moves are good, and roll out is iconic. but since geodude has high defense and resists roll out, its best to body slam for extra damage and paralysis chance. once geodude is paralyzed, then switching to roll out is fine

both moves are good. clefairy takes 33% max so double team is a good set up once, but if it used reflect last turn and clefairy is faster then encore is a must click because it locks it into reflect which fails if its active already. only risk is them switching then encore does nothing. so if faster encore, if slower then double team once

destiny bond is a bad play here because you have to go first and takes down both (and relies on gengar dying, it could set up on you or switch or not do enough damage) when you have a move that does 300% damage! just take the kill, simple
never worry about being cheap, its a legal play. sleep is broken, do it.

focus punch is a straight up terrible move. the player is highly likely to attack here. ice punch is a really good move here, high damage and chance to kill. however an even better play is saving your HP when you have a rock type in the back to wall a flying normal type with huge defense
